title: Ambitious Road
description:
Wielding ambition as your sword, rise through the turbulent times.Become Michel, a young officer burning with ambition, and forge your path to power in this authentic war chronicle SRPG.

With an overwhelming volume of content—45 main maps and over 10 side story maps—this game depicts a world of war, political intrigue, and fateful love.

Lead a reliable and charismatic elite force, employ meticulous strategies, and forge a gritty yet glorious path to success.

Game SystemThis is a traditional turn-based strategy RPG where you control characters called "units" turn by turn.

Fight against enemy forces and achieve chapter-specific objectives (capture bases, defeat enemy generals, move to specific locations, etc.).

As your units grow (level up), they will acquire powerful "skills"!

Each unit will engage in one-on-one combat; make effective use of weapon advantages and unit type specializations to your advantage!

Your army will prepare for battle at the "Base" between battles.

At the "Base" you can train your troops by completing quests, purchase weapons, and more.

About the story.

The story takes place on the continent of Vanacresia, which is divided into east and west.

The protagonist, Michel, is a young man of commoner origin who has become an officer in the kingdom's army in the powerful western kingdom of Mistral.

With secret ambitions for success in his heart, he carries out his duties calmly in the dreary peace of life alongside Eliza, a female officer of the same generation.

One day, Michel is approached by her superior officer, Antoine, a nobleman of the same generation, to participate in a military diplomatic ceremony with the Vanguardia Empire, a great power in the east.

Michel is excited about this honorable mission, one that doesn't usually come her way.

However, during the ceremony, General Jonathan, the representative of the Imperial Army, is assassinated by unknown assailants.

Three months later, this is used as an excuse to declare war in the name of the Emperor,

and the Kingdom of Mistral and its allies are dragged into war, whether they like it or not.
description_short: Charge forward on the path of ambition...! Rise through the turbulent times with Michel, a young officer harboring ambitions for advancement! Fight your way through this simple yet traditional war SRPG alongside Michel, a dark hero like Napoleon or Julien Sorel!
